codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature requirements: it enforces a hard 10MB upload limit before calling arrayBuffer(), returns HTTP 413 with a clear error message, and adds integration coverage for both accepted and oversized uploads.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The app-worker skill procedure treats agent-browser verification as a required step, but this backend-only feature was correctly verified via API-level curl checks; the procedure appears too rigid for non-UI features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/.factory/skills/app-worker/SKILL.md:75-83 defines manual verification via agent-browser; /Users/lifan/.factory/missions/5425a29a-aae7-4167-9768-fb4d1b79fcb8/handoffs/2026-04-19T15-30-36-978Z__upload-size-limit__4eaf26c0-b9e0-40b6-8238-516086d3492e.json:67-76 records followedProcedure=false and backend-only curl verification rationale.

summary: Pass. The upload-size-limit feature is correctly implemented: uploads over 10MB are rejected with 413 and clear messaging, while normal uploads continue to succeed with test coverage in place.
